setup.notes: Hybrid model: product sales, installation, maintenance, consumables, and subscription monitoring.
setup.project_name: Dubai Smart Water Filtration Expansion Plan
setup.business_description: AquaPure Smart Filters FZE imports high-quality water filtration components, assembles smart filtration systems locally, installs them for residential and commercial customers, and provides ongoing maintenance, filter replacement, and IoT-based water quality monitoring subscriptions.

products.name: Residential Smart Filtration System
products.description: Smart under-sink and villa water filtration unit with basic IoT water quality indicator.

products.name: Commercial Smart Filtration System
products.description: Larger-capacity filtration system for restaurants, offices, clinics, and small commercial facilities.

products.name: Standard Installation Service
products.description: Installation, setup, water-flow test, and customer handover for residential and commercial systems.

products.name: Annual Maintenance Contract
products.description: Annual maintenance package including inspection, cleaning, minor adjustments, and priority support.

products.name: Replacement Filter Pack
products.description: Replacement cartridge and membrane filter pack for existing AquaPure customers.

products.name: Smart Water Monitoring Subscription
products.description: Monthly digital monitoring service for water quality alerts, maintenance reminders, and customer dashboard.

revenue.notes: Split terms: 30% cash on delivery, 70% within 30 days (mapped to Net 30).
Split terms: 20% cash on delivery, 80% within 45 days (mapped to Net 45).
Installations track total system sales; seasonality mirrors residential systems.
Annual contracts. 50% cash, 50% within 30 days (mapped to Net 30). Churn 8% annually.
~2 packs per active customer per year.

direct_costs.notes: Placeholder for possible local assembly partner in Year 2.
direct_costs.name: Future Local Assembly Outsourcing Cost

fixed_assets.name: Assembly Tools and Workbench Equipment
fixed_assets.description: Workbench, hand tools and assembly jigs for local filter assembly.

fixed_assets.name: Delivery and Service Van
fixed_assets.description: Sign-written van for delivery, installation and service visits.

fixed_assets.name: IoT Monitoring Platform Development
fixed_assets.description: Capitalised development of the smart water-monitoring platform.

working_capital.notes: Blended assumptions across revenue streams. Commercial systems carry longer receivable (45d) and inventory (75d) cycles than residential; imported components are paid in 45 days with a 20% advance. Inventory planning is critical due to supplier lead times.

equity.notes: Founder 75% / Investor 25%. Investor funds drawn 2026-03-01. No dividends Years 1-2; up to 20% of net profit from Year 3.
equity.use_of_funds: Inventory purchase, marketing launch, IoT platform development, working capital buffer, and hiring.

loans.notes: 1.5% arrangement fee (3,750 AED). Used for service van and equipment.
loans.name: Vehicle and Equipment Finance

loans.notes: 2% arrangement fee (6,000 AED). Supports inventory growth and receivables cycle.
loans.name: Working Capital Facility

grants.notes: Not guaranteed; include in optimistic scenario only.
grants.name: Sustainability Innovation Support Grant
grants.restrictions: Must be used for smart monitoring, water-efficiency awareness, and customer education.

tax.notes: UAE corporate tax (9%) and VAT (5%). Social security 0% for expatriate staff. Keep flexible for free-zone qualifying income.

scenarios.notes: Includes the 100,000 AED Sustainability Innovation Support Grant (optimistic scenario only).
scenarios.label: Optimistic Case
